calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY, CARPENTERS PENSION, CARPENTERS ANNUITY, CARPENTERS TRAINING, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
Appearances: Leslie V. Freeman of Weinberg Roger & Rosenfeld (510.337.1001) for petitioner and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
